title: Amtech V4095 P240 Hook and Loop Orbital Sanding Sheets, 10 Piece Set, 125mm Diameter Sanding Paper
features: Set of 10 Perforated orbital sanding sheets for sanding most types of wood and painted surfaces, as well as plaster and fillers.
125mm Diameter sanding paper with 8 precise holes for efficient dust extraction and preventing clogging and static.
Features hook and loop backing for quick and easy handling and installation.

Please note the desired finish depends on the different types of grit available. P60 Grit is for coarse sanding and P80 Grit is ideal for medium to coarse sanding. Whereas a P120 Grit is for medium sanding, and a P240 Grit would be better for an extra fine finish.
All Grits available from Amtech. P60 Grit (Amtech V4080), P80 Grit (Amtech V4085), P120 Grit (Amtech V4090), and P240 Grit (Amtech V4095).
description: Product Description The Amtech Sanding Sheet range is suitable for polishing various types of wood and painted surfaces, in order to achieve your desired finish. You can also use the orbital sanding sheets on various metal surfaces and automotive coatings, whilst carrying out repairs. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
